caption: A man with short, dark hair and a beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a large professional condenser microphone with a pop filter. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and a dark, long-sleeved shirt over a grey undergarment. The background consists of dark grey, ribbed acoustic sound-proofing panels arranged in a grid pattern. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a stationary position, but his gaze shifts. In the initial moments, he looks slightly to the side and then upward, with his eyes moving toward the top right of the frame. His facial expression remains neutral as he looks around the room, while the microphone and studio equipment remain still in the foreground. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
